name: BERT (Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers)
training_approach: Masked language modeling + next sentence prediction on BooksCorpus and English Wikipedia
key_innovations: Bidirectional pretraining — reads text in both directions simultaneously
Masked language modeling (MLM) as a pretraining objective
Demonstrated that pretraining then fine-tuning crushes task-specific models
Set new state-of-the-art on 11 NLP benchmarks simultaneously
cultural_impact: BERT revolutionized NLP by proving that a single pretrained model could be fine-tuned to dominate virtually every language understanding task. Google integrated BERT into Search in 2019, affecting 10% of queries — one of the largest changes to the search algorithm in years. BERT spawned a massive family of encoder-only models and established the pretrain-then-fine-tune paradigm that defines modern NLP.
